Plugins.Name: HealthBars
Plugins.Description: Draw health, energy shield, mana and ward bars above entities in the game world. Supports customisable bar style and per-monster-type visibility rules.

Plugins.Name: Radar
Plugins.Description: Draws a live minimap overlay with entity positions, POI markers, and pathfinding routes. Highlights stairs, boss arenas, and Delve chests using built-in TGT file lists.

Plugins.Name: NinjaPricer
Plugins.Description: Overlays poe.ninja price tags on stash cells and lists all items in open tabs in a sidebar window. Highlights valuable items above a configurable chaos threshold.

Plugins.Name: AutoHotKeyTrigger
Plugins.Description: Automatically presses keys for flasks and skills when user-defined conditions are met (vitals, buffs, nearby monsters, status effects). Supports multiple profiles and an emergency AutoQuit trigger.

Plugins.Name: Atlas
Plugins.Description: Draws labels, biome borders, and group colours on the endgame atlas map. Supports named map groups, content filtering, and map search.
